scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w infra
scripts.deploy:infra: npm run build && npm run deploy -w infra --
scripts.deploy:infra:production: npm run build:deploy:production && npm run deploy -w infra -- WeddingSiteCertificates-production WeddingSite-production -c envName=production
scripts.deploy:infra:staging: npm run build:deploy:staging && npm run deploy -w infra -- WeddingSiteCertificates-staging WeddingSite-staging -c envName=staging
scripts.destroy:infra:production: npm run destroy -w infra -- WeddingSite-production WeddingSiteCertificates-production -c envName=production
scripts.destroy:infra:staging: npm run destroy -w infra -- WeddingSite-staging WeddingSiteCertificates-staging -c envName=staging
